name: atelier-floorplan-module
description: Floorplan — the three-folder layout for serious agent development, installed: instance folder (the wiring), modules folder (the workshop), chromes folder (hands off) — each with its own CLAUDE.md playbook, filled with your instance's real paths and appended-with-backup, never clobbered. A live checklist reads your instance (folders, installPath wiring, playbook states), and a migration scan lists what still lives in the wrong folder with a copyable agent brief. Works right after a fresh install or as the guided migration for a long-running instance.
author: pa1nd

atelier.note: Pure Node builtins, no deps; runs anywhere Atelier does. Everything it changes is local and reversible: folders are created with mkdir -p (existing ones untouched), atelier.config.json edits are atomic read-modify-writes, and an existing CLAUDE.md is backed up next to the file before the playbook is appended. Migration (moving module folders) is never automated — the module produces a copyable step-by-step brief for an agent instead.
